hero.subtitle: Create a shareable wish list in seconds. Share before any occasion — friends reserve gifts without duplicates or spoilers.
hero.badge: Free forever · No credit card needed

howItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.title: Three steps to perfect gifting
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to a perfect gift experience
howItWorks.step1Description: Add gifts you'd love to receive. Set your privacy preferences.
howItWorks.step2Description: Send your list via link, email, or QR code to friends and family.
howItWorks.step3Description: No duplicates, no spoiled surprises. Everyone picks something unique.

demoVideo.title: See it in action
demoVideo.subtitle: Watch how Podaruj.me works end to end. Create a list in seconds, share it via link or QR code, and let friends pick unique gifts — no duplicates, no account needed.

features.label: FEATURES
features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Powerful features that make gift giving simple and fun
features.privacyDescription: Control who sees what. Full surprise or open coordination — you decide how reservations work.
features.privacyBuyersChoiceDesc: Guests choose to reveal or stay anonymous
features.privacyFullSurpriseDesc: Owner sees nothing until the big day
features.qrDescription: Print or share a QR code. One scan takes your friends straight to your list.
features.emailShareDescription: Send a pre-filled email with your list link to friends and family.
features.noAccountDescription: Guests browse and reserve without signing up.
features.countdownDescription: See how many days until the big occasion.

testimonials.label: TESTIMONIALS
testimonials.title: People actually love it
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of happy users who made their special occasions unforgettable.
testimonials.t1Quote: I shared my list in our family group chat and everyone picked something I actually wanted. No more awkward duplicates!
testimonials.t2Quote: The surprise mode was perfect for our wedding. We had no idea who bought what until we opened everything together.
testimonials.t3Quote: Full Surprise mode was a game changer. For the first time in years I had no idea what I was getting!
testimonials.t4Quote: We used it for Christmas and for the first time nobody received a duplicate present. Absolute magic.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes, completely free. Create unlimited lists and share them with anyone.
faq.q2: Do my friends need an account?
faq.a2: No. Anyone with the link can browse your list and reserve gifts without signing up.
faq.a3: You choose one of three modes: Buyer's Choice (guests decide if they reveal themselves), Visible (everyone sees who reserved what), or Full Surprise (you see nothing until the big day).
faq.q4: Can I share my list on social media?
faq.a4: Yes. Share via link, QR code, or email. Works in any messenger or social platform.
faq.a5: Your list closes automatically when the event date passes. All reservation data is preserved and you can see a summary of who reserved what.

cta.title: Start your first list in 2 minutes
cta.subtitle: Free forever. No credit card. Works for birthdays, weddings, Christmas — any occasion.

metadata.title: Podaruj.me — Gift Lists Made Simple
metadata.description: Create wish lists for any occasion and share them with friends and family. Free, no account needed to browse.

signIn.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
signIn.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
signIn.footerNote: Sign in with Google or a magic link — no password required

myLists.title: My Lists
myLists.emptyDescription: Create your first gift list and share it with friends and family.

reservations.emptyDescription: When you reserve gifts on someone else's list, they'll appear here.

settings.title: Profile settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.dangerZoneDescription: Once you delete your account, there is no going back.
settings.deleteDialogDescription: This will permanently delete your account, all your lists, items, and reservation data. This action cannot be undone.

create.fullSurpriseWarning: Full Surprise mode is permanent and cannot be changed later. Are you sure?

detail.daysLeft: {count, plural, one {# day left} other {# days left}}

detail.buyersChoiceHint: Guests choose whether to show their name to you
detail.fullSurpriseHint: Reservations are hidden from you — maximum surprise!
detail.confirmPublishDescription: Once published, you won't be able to edit or delete existing items. New items can still be added.

notFound.title: List not found
notFound.description: This list doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

privacyModes.buyers_choice_description: Guests decide if they want to reveal their name
privacyModes.full_surprise_description: You won't see any reservations — maximum surprise!

closeDialog.title: Close this list?
closeDialog.description: No new reservations will be accepted. Existing reservations are preserved. You can reopen the list later if the event date hasn't passed.

deleteDialog.title: Permanently delete this list?
deleteDialog.descriptionWithClose: All items and reservations will be permanently lost. If you just want to stop accepting reservations, you can close the list instead.

surpriseReveal.title: Reveal your gifts?
surpriseReveal.description: Your list had Full Surprise mode. Would you like to see who reserved your gifts?

items.closedBanner: This list is closed. Reopen it to make changes.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Any details about what you'd like...
form.publishedSurpriseWarning: This item cannot be edited or deleted after it's added — the list is already published.

empty.title: No gifts yet
empty.description: Add your first gift to this list!

confirmDelete.title: Delete this gift?
confirmDelete.description: This gift will be permanently removed from the list.
confirmDelete.surpriseWarning: This list uses Full Surprise mode — someone may have already bought this gift. Deleting it could lead to duplicate gifts.

items.reservedCannotEdit: This item is reserved and cannot be edited
items.publishedCannotEdit: This item was locked when the list was published
items.surpriseCannotEdit: Editing is disabled — this list may have reservations

public.listNotFoundDescription: This list doesn't exist or has been removed.

privacyDescriptions.buyers_choice: You can choose whether to reveal your name to the list owner when reserving.

privacyDescriptions.full_surprise: Your reservation is completely hidden — the list owner won't see it.
